device_name: QOCA® image Smart RT Contouring System
intended_use: QOCA® image Smart RT Contouring System is a post-processing software intended to automatically contour DICOM CT imaging data using deep-learning-based algorithms. Contours that are generated by QOCA®
intended_use_full: QOCA® image Smart RT Contouring System is a post-processing software intended to automatically contour DICOM CT imaging data using deep-learning-based algorithms. Contours that are generated by QOCA® image Smart RT Contouring System may be used as input for clinical workflows including external beam radiation therapy treatment planning. QOCA® image Smart RT Contouring System must be used in conjunction with appropriate software such as Treatment Planning Systems and Interactive Contouring applications, to review, edit, and accept contours generated by QOCA® image Smart RT Contouring System.
target_condition: Patients requiring external beam radiation therapy treatment planning requiring identification and segmentation of organs at risk
ground_truth: Ground truth annotations established following DAHANCA, EORTC, GORTEC, HKNPCSG, NCIC CTG, NCRI, NRG Oncology and TROG consensus guidelines for head and neck, and Pelvic Normal Tissue Contouring Guidelines for Radiation Therapy: A Radiation Therapy Oncology Group Consensus Panel Atlas for pelvis
other_metrics: Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) reported for 17 organs at risk in head and neck and pelvis regions, ranging from 0.805 to 0.985; Hausdorff Distance (HD95) also reported; median DSC > 0.80 achieved across all organs
